text:
Created attachment 253776
www/py-mov-cli-files

mov-cli-files is a plugin for the mov-cli version 4, designed to
facilitate the playback of music and videos stored on a user's device.
It allows users to search for and play media files using specific
commands in the terminal. Users can also specify search paths
and retrieve all files with wildcard queries.

https://github.com/mov-cli/mov-cli-files
